name: .windsurfrules — Project Rules
description: .windsurfrules defines per-project behavior rules for Windsurf's Cascade agent.
content:
# Windsurf Cascade Rules

## Code Style
- TypeScript strict mode
- Named exports only
- 2-space indentation

## Cascade Behavior
- Explain what you're about to do before editing
- Ask before deleting any file
- Keep changes scoped
- Run npm test before finishing any task

name: Global Windsurf Rules
description: Global rules stored in Windsurf's memory system, applied across all workspaces.
content:
# Global Rules

- Read existing code before suggesting changes
- Follow the codebase's existing patterns
- Never use `any` in TypeScript
- Write self-documenting code
- Suggest the simpler solution first
